user.title: Brightwheel Login
user.description:
Brightwheel uses bot protection that blocks direct login. You need to provide your auth cookie from a browser session.

Run: node scripts/refresh_brightwheel_cookie.js

Or copy the _brightwheel_v2 cookie from DevTools after logging in at schools.mybrightwheel.com.

reconfigure.title: Refresh Brightwheel Cookie
reconfigure.description:
The Brightwheel auth cookie expires periodically. Paste a fresh _brightwheel_v2 cookie below.

Run: node scripts/refresh_brightwheel_cookie.js

error.invalid_auth: Invalid or expired auth cookie. Please extract a fresh cookie.
